## 📋 Summary

What does this PR do? Provide a brief description of the changes.

Fixes #(issue_number)

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🚀 New feature

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding guidelines
- [ ] I've added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] My code passes Ruff formatting (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`mypy src/`)
- [ ] I've updated the documentation (if needed)
- [ ] I've updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them:

1. Run `python -m pytest tests/test_xxx.py -v`
2. Start the API and send `curl http://localhost:8000/...`
